# Turbodoc

> Turbodoc is a fast, open-source knowledge base for humans and AI agents: bookmarks, markdown notes, code snippets, and diagrams, synced across web, iOS, and browser extensions. AI assistants can read and write a user's Turbodoc library through a hosted MCP (Model Context Protocol) server with 22 tools, authenticated via OAuth 2.0.

Turbodoc is free while in beta. Made by Classic Apps Co. All source code is open source at https://github.com/turbodoc-org.

## Connect an AI assistant (MCP)

- [MCP overview and setup](https://turbodoc.ai/mcp): Connect Claude, Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, or any MCP client
- MCP endpoint (Streamable HTTP): https://api.turbodoc.ai/mcp
- Auth: OAuth 2.0 Protected Resource (RFC 9728) — users sign in with their Turbodoc account; no API keys needed
- Tools: full CRUD + search for bookmarks, notes, code snippets, and diagrams, plus batch operations and tag listing

## Docs

- [Documentation hub](https://turbodoc.ai/docs): Guides for the app, MCP, and API
- [MCP setup guide](https://turbodoc.ai/docs/mcp): Step-by-step setup for each MCP client, with example prompts
- [REST API](https://turbodoc.ai/docs/api): API overview and authentication
- [OpenAPI spec](https://api.turbodoc.ai/swagger.json): Machine-readable API reference
- [Interactive API docs](https://api.turbodoc.ai/swagger): Swagger UI

## Use cases

- [Agent memory](https://turbodoc.ai/use-cases/agent-memory): Give AI agents a persistent, user-owned memory store via MCP
- [Personal knowledge base](https://turbodoc.ai/use-cases/knowledge-base): One searchable library for links, notes, code, and diagrams
- [Save from AI chats](https://turbodoc.ai/use-cases/save-from-ai-chats): Capture links, notes, and code directly from Claude or ChatGPT conversations

## Apps

- [Web app](https://turbodoc.ai): Sign up and use Turbodoc in the browser
- [iOS app](https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/turbodoc/id6749333065): Native app with share extension, widgets, voice-to-text, and OCR
- [Chrome extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/turbodoc/fjncckldanedaaaoeapkponpplkahbdg): One-click bookmarking
- [Firefox add-on](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/turbodoc/): One-click bookmarking

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](https://turbodoc.ai/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://turbodoc.ai/terms)
